title: Faridabad, Haryana — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Faridabad, Haryana: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Faridabad is a city in Haryana with a population of 1,500,000. A major industrial city in Haryana and part of the Delhi NCR, known for its manufacturing and automotive industries.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
